examples: I'm very impressed by your tidiness and order.
A quill pen on writing paper demands you to care and pay attention to grammar, tidiness, controlled thinking.
The authors are witheringly contemptuous of the bogus equation of tidiness and morality.
Barnes followed his friend the philosopher John Dewey in rejecting the meat-rack tidiness of standard museums.
Through all those weeks, their house had never lapsed from its perfect tidiness and order.
